audit_status.source_base: Greek Gospel text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: Compact complete draft reviewed for Sermon opening: makarioi, poor in spirit, meek/gentle, righteousness/justice hunger, mercy, pure heart, peacemakers, Torah fulfillment, anger, Gehenna, reconciliation, lust/desire, divorce, oaths, retaliation, and enemy-love.

verses.restored: Seeing the crowds, Jesus went up into the mountain; and when he sat down, his disciples came to him.
He opened his mouth and taught them, saying:
Blessed/flourishing are the poor in spirit, for theirs is the reign of the heavens.
Blessed/flourishing are those who mourn, for they will be comforted.
Blessed/flourishing are the gentle/meek, for they will inherit the earth.
Blessed/flourishing are those who hunger and thirst for righteousness/justice, for they will be filled.
Blessed/flourishing are the merciful, for they will receive mercy.
Blessed/flourishing are the pure in heart, for they will see the Divine.
Blessed/flourishing are the peacemakers, for they will be called sons/children of the Divine.
Blessed/flourishing are those persecuted because of righteousness/justice, for theirs is the reign of the heavens.
Blessed/flourishing are you when people insult you, persecute you, and say every evil thing against you falsely because of me.
Rejoice and be glad, for your reward is great in the heavens; for in this way they persecuted the prophets before you.
You are the salt of the earth; but if salt becomes tasteless, with what will it be salted? It is no longer strong for anything except to be thrown outside and trampled by people.
You are the light of the world. A city set on a hill cannot be hidden.
Nor do they light a lamp and place it under a basket, but on the lampstand, and it shines for all in the house.
In the same way, let your light shine before people, so they may see your beautiful/good works and give glory to your Father in the heavens.
Do not think that I came to dissolve the Law or the Prophets; I did not come to dissolve but to fulfill.
Amen, I say to you: until heaven and earth pass away, not one iota or one stroke will pass from the Law until all comes to be.

Therefore whoever loosens one of the least of these commands and teaches people so will be called least in the reign of the heavens; but whoever does and teaches them will be called great in the reign of the heavens.
For I say to you: unless your righteousness/justice exceeds that of the scribes and Pharisees, you will certainly not enter the reign of the heavens.
You have heard that it was said to the ancient ones, You shall not murder; and whoever murders will be liable to judgment.

But I say to you that everyone angry with a brother or sister will be liable to judgment; whoever says to a brother or sister, Empty-head, will be liable to the council; and whoever says, Fool, will be liable to the Gehenna of fire.
Therefore if you bring your gift to the altar and there remember that your brother or sister has something against you,
leave your gift there before the altar, go first and be reconciled to your brother or sister, and then come offer your gift.
Be well-disposed quickly toward your accuser while you are with him on the way, lest the accuser hand you to the judge, the judge to the officer, and you be thrown into prison.
Amen, I say to you: you will certainly not come out from there until you have paid the last quadrans.
You have heard that it was said, You shall not commit adultery.
But I say to you that everyone looking at a woman in order to desire/covet her has already committed adultery with her in his heart.
If your right eye causes you to stumble, remove it and throw it from you; for it is better for one part of you to perish than for your whole body to be thrown into Gehenna.
And if your right hand causes you to stumble, cut it off and throw it from you; for it is better for one part of you to perish than for your whole body to go into Gehenna.
It was also said: Whoever releases his wife, let him give her a document of release.
But I say to you that everyone releasing his wife, except for sexual unfaithfulness, makes her be adulterized; and whoever marries a released woman commits adultery.
Again you have heard that it was said to the ancient ones: You shall not swear falsely, but shall give back to the Lord your oaths.
But I say to you not to swear at all: neither by heaven, because it is the throne of the Divine,
nor by the earth, because it is the footstool of his feet, nor by Jerusalem, because it is the city of the great King.
Nor shall you swear by your head, because you are not able to make one hair white or black.
Let your word be yes, yes; no, no. What exceeds these comes from the evil/harmful one.
You have heard that it was said: Eye for eye, and tooth for tooth.
But I say to you not to violently resist the evil/harmful person; but whoever strikes you on your right cheek, turn to him the other also.
To the one wanting to sue you and take your tunic, let him have your cloak also.
Whoever compels you for one mile, go with him two.
Give to the one asking you, and do not turn away from the one wanting to borrow from you.
You have heard that it was said: You shall love your neighbor and hate your enemy.
But I say to you: love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you,
so that you may become children of your Father in the heavens, because he makes his sun rise on evil and good and sends rain on righteous and unrighteous.
For if you love those who love you, what reward do you have? Do not even the tax collectors do the same?
And if you greet only your brothers and sisters, what more are you doing? Do not even the nations do the same?
Therefore you shall be complete/whole, as your heavenly Father is complete/whole.
